channel.title: Jithendra Kumar — Blog
channel.description: Blog posts about cloud architecture, DevOps, and MLOps.

item.title: Learning never stops in engineering
item.description: Engineering stays interesting because learning never really stops, whether it happens in a course, a document, or a production issue.

item.title: The best platforms feel simple
item.description: Simple platform experiences usually come from thoughtful engineering, not from a lack of complexity under the hood.

item.title: Reliability is a form of trust
item.description: Reliable systems create trust for teams, customers, and the business long before anyone calls it out explicitly.

item.title: Automation is not about replacing people
item.description: The best automation does not remove people from the process. It removes unnecessary friction from the process.

item.title: Good engineering is not always about building more
item.description: Good engineering often creates value by simplifying systems, reducing friction, and helping teams focus on what matters.

item.title: The invisible work behind smooth experiences
item.description: Smooth digital experiences are often powered by invisible engineering work that removes friction before anyone notices it.

item.title: Career paths: platform engineering and product thinking
item.description: Platform engineering benefits from product thinking because the work succeeds only when it improves how other teams build and operate.

item.title: AI guardrails and cost controls for production systems
item.description: Production AI systems need both guardrails and cost controls to stay reliable, safe, and financially sustainable.

item.title: Enabling MLOps: pipelines, validation, and model lifecycle
item.description: MLOps is less about isolated tooling and more about reliable pipelines, validation, and repeatable model operations.

item.title: Building reusable cloud foundations with Terraform
item.description: Reusable Terraform foundations make cloud provisioning more consistent, governed, and easier to scale across teams.

item.title: CI/CD modernization: real-world case study
item.description: A real-world modernization story focused on moving delivery systems toward stronger automation, controls, and repeatability.

item.title: Reflections on platform engineering as a career
item.description: A short reflection on platform engineering as a career path and the mindset required to keep growing with the work.

item.title: Modern CI/CD patterns for reliable delivery
item.description: A practical look at enterprise CI/CD patterns such as pipeline isolation, gated promotion, and safer release workflows.

item.title: Introducing the blog
item.description: A short introduction to the blog and the kinds of platform engineering, cloud, and MLOps topics it will cover.
